title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at iGate India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at iGate India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
